text: Eagles agree to trade A.J. Brown to Patriots for 2 draft picks - ESPN
fullText: The Eagles are trading star wide receiver A.J. Brown to the Patriots for a first-round draft pick in 2028 and a 2027 fifth-round pick.

text: Computex 2026: All the news and announcements - The Verge
fullText: Here’s all the highlights from Computex 2026, including Nvidia RTX Spark, new chips from Intel and Qualcomm, new versions of old chips from AMD, and more.

text: Iran warns Israeli attacks in Lebanon threaten ceasefire with US - BBC
fullText: Earlier Israel's PM ordered strikes on Beirut's southern suburbs in response to Hezbollah rocket and drone attacks on northern Israel.

text: Scoop: Trump admin plans to drop "weaponization" fund - Axios

text: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman after multiple ChatGPT-linked murders - Ars Technica
fullText: Altman has an "utter disregard" for human lives, Florida AG says.

text: Lebanese official told U.S. that Hezbollah ready for full ceasefire with Israel - Axios
fullText: "We are sure Hezbollah will commit to a total ceasefire. We know time is running out"

text: AI giant Anthropic prepares to sell stock to the public; files preliminary IPO paperwork - NPR
fullText: The Anthropic IPO, and those of other AI-related firms like OpenAI, could be among the biggest in U.S. history.

text: Former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters released from prison - Colorado Public Radio
fullText: Tina Peters, convicted on several counts and sentenced to nearly nine years in prison, was released early after Gov. Jared Polis commuted her sentence.

text: Thune says DOJ fund will need changes to unlock immigration bill - Politico
fullText: Opposition to the "Anti-Weaponization Fund" has complicated passage of the GOP's enforcement agenda.

text: 'Bereft and beleaguered' - Mandelson messages reveal criticism of No 10 - BBC
fullText: Newly published documents show Lord Mandelson and ministers' concerns about the prime minister and Labour MPs.

text: UAW strike hits GM truck supplier American Axle - The Detroit News
fullText: Almost 1,000 union members at the Three Rivers plant stopped work as they seek improved wages and benefits in a new contract.

text: US trades strikes with divided Iran regime as peace talks stall - Fox News
fullText: President Donald Trump says peace talks with Iran are continuing at a "rapid pace" on Monday even after telling the press that he is in no hurry to come to an agreement with Tehran.

text: Sony’s new fight stick and gaming monitor launch in August - The Verge
fullText: Sony says that its FlexStrike fight stick and 27-inch gaming monitor will launch in August. Launch details for its Pulse Elevate wireless speakers will come later this year.

text: Giants sign Odell Beckham Jr. - NBC Sports
fullText: Beckham will return to the team that made him a first-round pick in 2014.

text: Marilyn Monroe at 100: Reckoning With Her Legend and Legacy - Variety
fullText: Everyone from Lindsay Lohan to Ana de Armas has been inspired by Marilyn Monroe — here's why we still care so deeply.

fullText: "In terms of the story that we set out to tell, which is a story about addiction and its consequences, this feels like the end to me," Levinson told New York Times' Popcast after Sunday's season three finale.
